summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PROCTO 13 Phase 2 & 3 features: No Response status, Undo functionality, On Hold status, and Analytics page with KPI. All backend APIs working at 100% success rate (18/18 tests passed). Frontend integration verified with working modals and analytics dashboard.
passed_tests: 1. NO_RESPONSE status - Backend API working correctly, sets brand status to NO_RESPONSE
2. Undo functionality - Backend API working, can undo actions within 10-minute window
3. ON_HOLD status - Backend API working, sets brand on hold with reason and review date
4. Analytics KPI endpoint - Returns proper KPI data with user metrics and weighted scores
5. Analytics timeout checking - Review timeout and inactive brands detection working
6. Analytics shared contacts - Duplicate brand detection by domain working
7. System timeout check - Creates alerts for overdue brands
8. Frontend login - Admin and searcher login working correctly
9. Analytics page UI - KPI leaderboard displaying 5 users with proper metrics
10. Searcher interface - Brand claiming, navigation, and modal interactions working
11. No Response modal - Opens and closes correctly in brand detail page
12. On Hold modal - Opens and closes correctly in brand detail page
13. Brand detail page - All Phase 2 & 3 action buttons present and functional
14. Analytics dashboard - Timeout alerts, inactive brands, and shared contacts sections working
15. KPI metrics calculation - Stages completed, outcomes set, returns tracking working
